user_system_path: Seam #417 — audit-driven continuity sweep so the owner stops finding polish defects one at a time. (1) Deleted the entire orphaned components/layout/ directory (dashboard-shell, sidebar, mobile-nav, top-bar — 0 importers repo-wide); this also removes the off-brand gradient 'F' marks, leaving one consistent FolderaMark. (2) Added type='button' to the three demo buttons in LandingPage. (3) Removed user-visible 'Legacy' labels from signals + integrations pages. (4) Aligned the NavPublic mobile CTA to 'Start free'. Frontend-only, deterministic. Constraint: NO paid API calls to test — prove in the harness.
allowed_files_raw: Seam #417: delete dead components/layout/*; LandingPage type=button; signals/integrations Legacy copy; NavPublic CTA label; + control-plane.
forbidden_files_raw: No schema (supabase/**), no deps (package.json/lock), no runtime logic (lib/**, app/api/**).
required_local_proof: npm run gate:continuity && npm run build && npm run lint
required_browser_proof: Build + lint green; touched-file tsc clean (pre-existing test-type errors in lib/__tests__/multi-user-safety + briefing artifact-decision-enforcement are out of scope and unchanged). Live owner validation: brand mark is consistent, landing demo buttons behave, no 'Legacy' copy on Signals/Sources, mobile CTA reads 'Start free'.
acceptance_condition: The dead components/layout/ directory is gone with no broken imports, the landing demo buttons carry type=button, no user-visible 'Legacy' labels remain on Signals/Sources, the mobile CTA matches desktop ('Start free'), and gate:continuity + build + lint are green.
anti_regression_checks: npm run build green after deleting components/layout/
no repo references to the deleted layout files
stop_condition: Stop when the draft PR for #417 is open with CI green, or BLOCKED_WITH_EXACT_RECEIPT on owner-side visual validation.
next_command: Owner: skim the app for remaining inconsistencies. Then the real-move diagnosis — the brain is in safe-silence despite 2 connected sources because the external 15-min guardian cron is not firing and/or generation needs ANTHROPIC_API_KEY + a >=70 move; see the connect-data playbook.
